explanation: This LTL property ensures that whenever the system is supported and the sensor data is good, the autopilot will eventually transition from the PULLUP state to the TRANSITION state within 2 time steps. The formula uses the "until" operator (U) to capture the transition requirement and the "eventually" operator (F) to specify that the transition should occur within a finite time period. The atomic propositions "supported" and "good" represent the system health and sensor data conditions, respectively, while "state_is_PULLUP" and "state_is_TRANSITION" represent the autopilot states.
chosen_LTL_template: ((G ((! ((! bool_exp1) & (X bool_exp1))) | (X ((! (bool_exp1 & (X (! bool_exp1)))) U bool_exp3)))) & (bool_exp1 -> ((! (bool_exp1 & (X (! bool_exp1)))) U bool_exp3)))

The property ensures that the autopilot responds promptly to changes in system health and sensor data by transitioning to the TRANSITION state.
